summary: Split-Environment BC Integration feature testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend UI test cases passed (100%). The app correctly routes reads to Production BC environment and writes to Sandbox_11_3_2025, with a hard production write-guard active.
critical_code_review_comments: Split-environment configuration correctly implemented in business_central_service.py and gpi_integration_service.py
BC_READ_ENVIRONMENT=Production and BC_WRITE_ENVIRONMENT=Sandbox_11_3_2025 properly configured in backend/.env
BC_BLOCK_PRODUCTION_WRITES=true is enforced with _check_write_protection() guard function
All three status endpoints correctly return read/write environment info
Sidebar displays BC CONNECTED with READ Production and WRITE Sandbox_11_3_2025
BC Integration Dashboard shows environment banner with Production read badge, Sandbox write badge, and write-guard active message
Vendor lookup (GET /api/ap-review/vendors) correctly uses Production BC (mock=false)
CreateBCSalesOrderPanel.js and CreateBCPurchaseInvoicePanel.js show split-env notice explaining validation vs. creation environments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Split-environment BC integration is fully functional. Reads (vendor lookup, PO validation) route to Production. Writes (create SO, create PI) route to Sandbox_11_3_2025. Production write-guard is active to prevent accidental production writes. UI correctly displays both environments in sidebar and dashboard.

GET /api/ap-review/vendors?search=cargo.notes: Returns real vendor data from Production BC (mock=false)
